description.value:
At 3rd level, As a bonus action you can expend one hit dice to enter into the Altered state as you push your demon body to greater heights, you must also expend a hit die at the start of each of your turns in order to remain in this form, in this state you gain the following benefits:

  • you gain resistance to non-chakra enhanced bludgeoning piercing and slashing damage
  • You gain a +2 to your ac, this increases to a +4 at 11th level.
  • You gain a +3 to the hp regained when using the regeneration ability for each hit die spent, this increases to a +6 at 11th level.
  • Your unarmed damage die becomes a d6, if it's already a d6 it instead increases by 1 step, your unarmed attacks count as chakra enhanced. This increases by 1 step at 11th level.
  • Your movement speed is increased by 5ft, this is increased to 15ft at 11th level.
  • As a part of entering this state you get a number of temporary hit points = (your character level + con modifier)x2
  • your unarmed strikes and weapons gain the reach property while in this transformation, if a weapon already has the reach property it gains an addition rank of reach.
  • while in this transformation you can expend one hit die to remove a rank of a physical condition.

At 11th level your transformation changes, granting you the following additional benefits:

  • You may expend a hit die in this state once per attack action to gain an additional attack.
  • When you make an unarmed or weapon attack, you may add your constitution modifier to the damage roll as well, on top of any other bonus to damage.
